name: Tuna Mushroom Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring water and bouillon to a boil, stirring to dissolve.
2. Add the next eight ingredients; return to a boil. Reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
4. Dissolve corn starch in milk; add to the vegetable mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Bring to a boil; boil 2 minutes or until thickened.
6. Remove from the heat; stir in Swiss cheese and mayonnaise until cheese is melted.
7. Fold in noodles and flaked tuna.
8. Pour into a greased 2-1/2 quart baking dish.
9. Brown bread crumbs in butter. Sprinkle on top of casserole.
10. Bake, uncovered, at 350 for 25-30 minutes or until heated through.
